tts.label: Text to Speech
tts.description: Generate speech from text with a described voice

voice_description.label: Voice description
voice_description.description: Describe the speaker in plain English — gender, tone, pace, expressiveness, recording quality. This is Parler-TTS's equivalent of a voice preset.
voice_description.default: A warm female voice, slightly expressive, moderate pace, clear studio quality.

strategies.label: Optimise for Parler TTS Mini
strategies.instruction: Keep all words and descriptors the user wrote exactly as they are. Expand the description by adding any missing Parler-TTS voice attributes — gender, tone (warm/bright/authoritative/friendly), pace (slow/moderate/fast), expressiveness level, and recording environment — only if the user has not already specified them. Return one natural-language sentence. Do not remove, replace, or reinterpret anything the user wrote.

tagline: Parler-TTS Mini — describe the voice in plain English
description:
Parler-TTS Mini is a ~880M-parameter text-to-speech model from
Hugging Face's fully-open Parler-TTS project. Unlike preset-voice
models, you steer the speaker with a natural-language description —
gender, tone, pace, expressiveness and recording quality — making it
a flexible complement to a fast preset model like Kokoro.
notes: GPU recommended (~4 GB VRAM); runs on CPU but noticeably slower.
Weights (~3.6 GB, model.safetensors) downloaded from Hugging Face at build time and baked into the image (see Dockerfile weight-download layer).
License verified at weights + training-data + architecture level — Apache-2.0 with no Llama-derivative or CC-BY-NC training-data trap.
Quality scales with the specificity of the voice description; the Improve strategy exists to coach users toward good descriptions.

strategies.label: Fix grammar
strategies.instruction: Fix spelling and grammar mistakes only. Do not change the meaning, structure, or intent of the text. Return only the corrected text.
